ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., user, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the movie */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of release */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre of the movie */,
  "director_id" INTEGER /* ID of the director of the movie */,
  "cast" TEXT /* Cast of the movie */,
  "plot_summary" TEXT /* Brief plot summary of the movie */,
  "poster_url" TEXT /* URL to the movie poster */,
  "trailer_url" TEXT /* URL to the movie trailer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the movie was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the movie was last updated */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Runtime of the movie in minutes */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the movie */,
  "awards" INTEGER /* Number of awards won by the movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_director_id FOREIGN KEY ("director_id") REFERENCES directors ("director_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "director_name" TEXT /* Name of the director */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the director */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actors" (
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each actor */,
  "actor_name" TEXT /* Name of the actor */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the actor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_actors" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the actor */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Name of the character played by the actor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user giving the rating */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being rated */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating value (1-5) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rating was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user writing the review */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being reviewed */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating value (1-5) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review was written */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "preferred_genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the preferred genre of the user */,
  "notifications_enabled" INTEGER /* Whether the user has enabled notifications */,
  "search_history" TEXT /* Search history of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_preferred_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("preferred_genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., user, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., view, like, comment) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the interaction occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommended movie */,
  "score" REAL /* Score of the recommendation */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the recommendation was generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "login_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user logged in */,
  "logout_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user logged out */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the award was won */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_awards_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actor_awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the actor */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the award was won */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actor_awards_actor_id FOREIGN KEY ("actor_id") REFERENCES actors ("actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "director_awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "director_id" INTEGER /* ID of the director */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the award was won */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_director_awards_director_id FOREIGN KEY ("director_id") REFERENCES directors ("director_id")
)
